scenario: A user wants to change the LLM model from GPT-3.5 to GPT-4o on a running Langflow flow without modifying the original flow.
expected_steps: get_flow to identify the Node ID of the LLM component
run_flow with the 'tweaks' parameter overriding the 'model_name' for that specific Node ID
common_failure: The agent tries to update_flow to change the model permanently instead of using dynamic tweaks.
